landing.hero_subtitle: Fitder matches you with personal trainers nearby based on your goals, budget, and schedule — then helps you train better with real-time AI posture correction.
landing.features_title: Everything you need to train smarter.
landing.feature_1_desc: Compatibility scoring across goals, budget, distance, schedule, and experience.
landing.feature_2_desc: Real-time availability with double-booking protection and live status updates.
landing.feature_3_desc: Train with built-in posture feedback. Track your form score over time.
landing.feature_4_desc: Distance-aware discovery surfaces coaches in your area, sorted by relevance.
landing.feature_5_desc: Admin-vetted profiles with certifications, specialties, and client reviews.
landing.feature_6_desc: Weight loss, muscle gain, strength, recomposition — find a specialist.
landing.how_heading: Three steps to your next session.
landing.step_1_desc: Tell us your goal, budget, and schedule.
landing.step_2_desc: See ranked trainers with compatibility scores.
landing.step_3_desc: Pick a slot, get confirmed, start training.
landing.about_subtitle: The future of personal training, powered by AI.
landing.about_mission_desc: At Fitder, we believe that high-quality personal training should be accessible to everyone. By combining human expertise with cutting-edge computer vision technology, we're building a platform that helps people move better, train smarter, and reach their goals faster.

auth.login_subtitle: Log in to manage your training.
auth.register_subtitle: Choose your role to get started.
